features: 12-Box Pack – Great for sharing, gifting, or stocking up on your favorite gummy pizzas
Fun Pizza Shapes – Enjoy a playful and delicious candy experience
Fruity & Chewy Goodness – Sweet and tangy flavors in every bite
5 Gummy Slices Per Box – Perfect for individual snacking or sharing with friends
Ideal for Parties & Gifts – A unique and tasty treat for birthdays, candy buffets, and celebrations
Gluten-Free – Enjoy worry-free snacking with high-quality ingredients
description: Product description Get ready for a playful and delicious candy experience with Gummi Zone Yummy Gummy Pizza! This 12-box pack is filled with fun, pizza-shaped gummy sweets that are bursting with fruity flavors Each box contains five soft and chewy gummy pizza slices, making it a perfect treat for kids and candy lovers of all ages With vibrant colors and realistic pizza toppings, these gummies make snacking more exciting Whether you're hosting a party, looking for a unique gift, or just craving a fun and flavorful sweet, these gummy pizzas are sure to delight Gluten-free and made with high-quality ingredients, they offer a guilt-free indulgence for any occasion Ingredients Glucose Syrup, Sugar, Water, Beef Gelatine, Apple Juice (5%) (from Concentrate), Humectant: Sorbitol Syrup, Acids: Citric Acid, Lactic Acid, Hydrolysed Pea Protein, Flavourings, Glazing Agents: Beeswax, Camauba Wax, Concentrates (Spirulina, Safflower), Colours :* E102, *E110, E120, *E129, E150C, *May have an adverse effect on activity and attention in children Directions Enjoy one box (5 slices) at a time. Suitable for all ages. Caution: These chewy candies may pose a choking hazard for young children. May stain due to artificial colors. See more
